action.reasoning: Observation: Previous iteration failed before training because train.py does not expose --out or --rnn_type even though model.py supports LSTM. Analysis: This is an argument/interface issue, not a modeling issue. To test recurrent diversity without disturbing the current best GRU ensemble, create a dedicated LSTM validation-ensemble trainer that saves a predict.py-compatible checkpoint. Decision: train a 3-seed unidirectional LSTM-DKT ensemble on train with validation checkpoint selection, smoke-test predict.py, and submit it to measure hidden AUC.
action.command: python train_lstm_val.py --out checkpoints/lstm_val_ensemble.pt --epochs 16 --hidden_dim 512 --dropout 0.25 --batch_size 128 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/lstm_val_ensemble.pt --output smoke_predictions_lstm.json

eval_result.eval_log:
